channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 44/46: defective vehicle
item.description: service obstruction towards Schottentor U. Line 46: service obstruction towards Josefstädter Straße U. expected duration: 16:30 watch. Reason: defective vehicle in … [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
service obstruction towards Schottentor U. Line 46: service obstruction towards Josefstädter Straße U. expected duration: 16:30 watch. Reason: defective vehicle in …
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: 48A: police operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: police operation. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: police operation.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: 46: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works in Lerchenfelder Straße the line 46 operating short-running will be. [16.03.2026 – 11.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in Lerchenfelder Straße the line 46 operating short-running will be.
[16.03.2026 – 11.07.2026]

item.title: 24A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion.

item.title: 16A/62: lock Hetzendorf
